# MDE 1.5.9

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Reverted the v1.5.8 lazy Explorer folder loading behavior after it made folder navigation feel slow.
- Restored the previous recursive workspace tree loading behavior so folders are available immediately when a workspace opens.
- Restored the previous Explorer visibility behavior so directories are not hidden just because they do not contain Markdown files.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Removed the separate Markdown file listing IPC path introduced for lazy Explorer trees.
- Restored the affected unit, integration, and E2E expectations to match the pre-v1.5.8 Explorer behavior.

## Documentation

- Updated the user manual to remove the v1.5.8 lazy-loading and Markdown-only folder guidance.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec vitest run --project unit apps/desktop/tests/unit/ExplorerTree.test.tsx apps/desktop/tests/unit/shell.test.tsx apps/desktop/tests/unit/MarkdownBlockEditor.test.tsx --testTimeout=30000`
- `pnpm exec vitest run --project integration apps/desktop/tests/integration/workspaceService.integration.test.ts apps/desktop/tests/integration/fileHandlers.integration.test.ts --testTimeout=30000`
- `pnpm exec playwright test --config apps/desktop/playwright.config.ts apps/desktop/tests/e2e/markdown-editor.e2e.test.ts -g "edits and auto-saves markdown, then creates a new file|copies explorer Markdown files with image assets from the context menu|inserts a Markdown link from the editor slash command picker|creates an editor link document from the visible current directory picker"`
- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm run docs:build`
- `pnpm run build`
- `pnpm run test:unit`
- `pnpm run test:integration`
- `pnpm run test:e2e`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/desktop test`

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP artifacts are built by the GitHub Release workflow.
- Windows NSIS installer artifacts are built by the GitHub Release workflow.
